title: Red's Tweaks
description: Adds a lot of QoL additions to MC! Gives use to rotten flesh, wandering traders, and more!
body:
![RedsTweaks v1.0 Items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9740dc1c09c3d1e9168e811fdb6df8190499d707.png)
------------------
This mod adds some Quality Of Life additions to Minecraft.
---------------
As of the most current version (1.0), RedsTweaks adds:

- Wandering Trader trades additions.
    1. Smithing Templates (Coast, Sentry, Dune, ect.)
    2. Ender Pearls
    3. Books
    4. Totem of Undying
    5. Mending Book
- Smelting rotten flesh into leather chunks, which can be converted to leather.
- Iron Beetroots, an alternative Golden Carrot food item.
- Modified Loot Tables of Structures for better rewards.
- Smelt raw material blocks into full material blocks.
